title: `Atrowth #5853
definition:
Ataroth-adar or Ataroth-addar = "crowns of glory"

 1) a Gadite town on the west border of Benjamin
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ataroth-adar or Ataroth-addar = "crowns of glory"

 1) a Gadite town on the west border of Benjamin

    NASB:  a place on the border between Ephraim and Benjamin
